name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store offers unsecured installment loans with same-day funding at physical locations. They serve customers with various credit profiles through in-store applications.
description_long:
Cash Store is a consumer finance company operating physical retail locations that specialize in short-term installment lending. The Houston location (Store #30796) at 19734 Tomball Parkway serves the greater Houston area with installment loans designed for personal expenses, bill consolidation, and unexpected costs.

The company primarily offers unsecured installment loans repaid on a fixed schedule over time, plus Netspend Prepaid Mastercard products and retail refinancing/reloading options for existing customers. Their application process is streamlined: customers can pre-qualify online, gather required documentation (ID, proof of income, active checking account), visit a physical store, and receive same-day funding upon approval. The Houston location operates Monday-Saturday with extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday).

Cash Store distinguishes itself through same-day funding capability, willingness to work with customers who have bad or no credit, and a straightforward in-person application process. The Houston location maintains a 4.9-star Google rating across 210 reviews, with customer testimonials consistently praising staff members by name (Janelle, Marlene, Marlen) for professionalism, patience, and clear explanations of loan terms.

However, as a personal installment lender, Cash Store's loan terms, interest rates, and APR are not disclosed on their website, making it impossible to assess actual cost of borrowing. The company requires active checking accounts (minimum 30 days old) and government-issued photo ID, which may exclude some applicants. While they claim to consider applications regardless of credit history, actual approval rates and pricing for different credit profiles remain opaque.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available after in-store approval and loan origination
Willingness to work with applicants who have bad credit or no credit history
4.9-star Google rating (210 reviews) with consistent positive staff feedback
Unsecured loans requiring no collateral or title
Fixed repayment schedule with clearly defined loan terms
Multiple application paths: online pre-qualification plus in-store completion
Extended store hours including Saturday morning (10am-2pm)
Flexible loan purposes: bill consolidation, major purchases, unexpected expenses
cons: No interest rates, APR, or loan cost information disclosed on website
Requires active checking account for 30+ days and government photo ID, excluding some applicants
Physical store visit required to complete application (not fully online)
No information about maximum loan amounts, repayment terms, or eligibility criteria
Website mentions Check 'n Go name but operates as Cash Store, creating potential confusion about company identity
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit or thin credit files who need quick personal loans
Houston-area residents seeking same-day funding for unexpected expenses or consolidation
Customers who prefer in-person financial interactions and staff guidance
Unbanked or underbanked individuals with active checking accounts
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston-area borrowers who need fast personal loans and have immediate access to a physical store location. The primary caveat is complete opacity around pricing and loan terms—no APR, interest rates, or fee structure is disclosed online, making it impossible to evaluate actual cost of borrowing before visiting the store.
services: Unsecured installment loans with fixed repayment schedules
Loan refinancing for existing retail customers
Loan reloads for existing retail customers
Google Maps directions and store locator
Customer review and rating platform access
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
